citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12PM on 4/30/2026.
The inspector attempted to contact the licensee/registrant by calling and texting, however in talking with the licensee, no
one was available to accompany the inspector on inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and
records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may
result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12PM on 4/30/2026. 
The inspector attempted to contact the licensee/registrant by calling and texting, however in talking with the licensee, no 
one was available to accompany the inspector on inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and 
records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may 
result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
